sessions.name: Portrait Session
sessions.description: One-on-one sessions built around you — your energy, your angles, your narrative. Includes pre-session consultation, 1–2 hour shoot at a location of your choice, and 25+ edited digital images delivered within two weeks.

sessions.name: Wedding Photography
sessions.description: Comprehensive coverage from getting ready through the last dance. Includes engagement session, full-day coverage, second shooter, and 300+ edited images in a private online gallery. Custom packages available.

sessions.name: Event Coverage
sessions.description: Corporate events, launches, galas, and gatherings documented with editorial precision. Includes pre-event planning, 3–6 hours of coverage, and 100+ edited images delivered within one week.

sessions.name: Lifestyle & Brand
sessions.description: Visual content for personal brands, small businesses, and creative projects. Includes creative direction consultation, 2–3 hour shoot across multiple setups, and 40+ edited images optimized for web and social.
